proposed_relations.description: Construction zone on Second Avenue: 100th St to 68th St, 61st St to 59th St; no planned changes to street design

evidence_refs.source_quote: 100 th St to 68 th St 61 st St to 59 th St
No planned changes to street design in construction zone (East 100th to East 68th Streets)

rationale: Page 26 labels the Second Avenue construction zone segments, and page 29 confirms no planned changes to street design in the construction zone (East 100th to East 68th Streets).

evidence_refs.source_quote: 100 th St to 68 th St 61 st St to 59 th St
No planned changes to street design in construction zone (East 100th to East 68th Streets)

quarantine.note: The cited blocks do not establish that the construction zone is a treatment OF the First/Second Avenue SBS project. p029_c0007 appears on a page explicitly headed 'Second Avenue Subway construction' (p029 block 2), revealing the construction zone belongs to the Second Avenue Subway (SAS) project, not the SBS project. The text states 'NYCT and DOT are working with SAS team to: Eliminate SBS station/routing conflicts' — the SBS project is coordinating around an external construction zone, not implementing it as its own treatment. The cited blocks merely list the zone's location (p026_c0010-11) and state no changes are planned there (p029_c0007). Co-occurrence in the SBS presentation does not constitute a stated 'has_treatment' relation.
